name: GENESIS-Online (Destatis)
description: Official German federal statistics from the Federal Statistical Office (Destatis) GENESIS-Online database: search 100,000+ tables on population, economy, migration, education, health, environment, and more. Free API token required.

tools.name: genesis_search
tools.description: Free-text search across GENESIS for tables, statistics, variables, time series and cubes. Returns codes (e.g. '12711-0001') that other tools consume.

tools.name: genesis_list_tables
tools.description: List tables filtered by code prefix or wildcard (e.g. '12711*' for migration tables, '61*' for prices).

tools.name: genesis_list_statistics
tools.description: Browse top-level GENESIS statistics (themes) by code prefix or wildcard.

tools.name: genesis_list_variables
tools.description: List variables (Merkmale) defined in GENESIS, optionally filtered by name prefix or type (regional, time, classifying, etc.).

tools.name: genesis_list_values
tools.description: List concrete values of a variable (e.g. all federal-state codes for the regional variable, all year keys for time).

tools.name: genesis_table_metadata
tools.description: Get the full structure of a table: variables, time range, last update, head/columns/rows layout.

tools.name: genesis_get_table
tools.description: Fetch the actual data of a table as a preview, with optional year and regional/classifying filters.

tools.name: genesis_get_timeseries
tools.description: Fetch a single time series by code with optional year filter.

tools.name: genesis_quality_signs
tools.description: Reference lookup for GENESIS quality codes used in data cells (e.g. '-', '/', '()', 'p').

author: freddy-schuetz
